title: Export table columns check
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
steps: 1. Open the Finance Page
expectedResult: The table correctly displays the columns: Receive Number ("เลขที่ลงรับ"), Project ("โครงการ"), Contract Staff ("ผู้รับผิดชอบบริหารสัญญา"), Budget Amount ("วงเงินงบประมาณ"), Department ("หน่วยงาน"), and Status ("สถานะ")

title: Change status to IN_PROGRESS 6
prerequisites:
1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
2. Project is in IN_PROGRESS 5 status
steps:
1. Select a project
2. Click the export report to finance action
expectedResult: The project status changes to "Finance Disbursement Sent" (IN_PROGRESS 6 / "ส่งเบิกฝ่ายการเงินแล้ว")

title: Prevent skipping workflow steps
prerequisites:
1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
2. Project is not yet eligible for export
steps: 1. Attempt to export or change status directly
expectedResult: The system prevents skipping workflow steps and rejects the action

title: Select partial items for export
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
testData: Multiple projects available for export
steps:
1. Select specific partial items from the list
2. Click the export action
expectedResult: Only the selected projects are exported and have their statuses updated

title: Select all items for export
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
testData: Multiple projects available for export
steps:
1. Check the "Select All" checkbox
2. Click the export action
expectedResult: All selected projects are processed and their statuses change to IN_PROGRESS 6

title: Sync Project ID
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
testData: Project that was recently updated in the Finance Page
steps: 1. Navigate to the Project ID Page of the selected project
expectedResult: The project status and details on the Project ID Page are fully synced and up-to-date

title: Default sort newest first
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
steps: 1. Open the Finance Page
expectedResult: The projects list is sorted by default from newest to oldest based on the time they entered IN_PROGRESS 5

title: Search receive no partial match
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
testData: A partial Receive Number string
steps: 1. Enter the partial Receive Number into the search field
expectedResult: The list filters to display projects matching the partial Receive Number

title: Search project title partial match
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
testData: A partial Project Title string
steps: 1. Enter the partial Project Title into the search field
expectedResult: The list filters to display projects matching the partial Project Title

title: Close project from Finance Page
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
testData: Project in an eligible state to be closed
steps:
1. Select the project
2. Click the close project action
expectedResult: The project status changes to CLOSED ("ปิดโครงการแล้ว") and syncs immediately to the Project ID Page

title: Return for edit shows reason modal
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
steps: 1. Click the return for edit ("ส่งคืนเพื่อแก้ไข") button for a project
expectedResult: The system opens a modal prompting the user to enter a reason for the return

title: Reason required for return
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
steps: 1. Attempt to confirm the return for edit action without providing a reason
expectedResult: The system prevents confirmation and shows a validation error

title: Status REQUEST_EDIT and notify
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
testData: A valid return reason
steps: 1. Confirm the return for edit action with the valid reason
expectedResult: The status changes to REQUEST_EDIT ("การเงินส่งคืนแก้ไข") and a notification containing the reason is sent to the assigned Contract Staff

title: Close project again after edit
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
testData: Project that was returned, edited, and resubmitted
steps:
1. Open the resubmitted project
2. Click the close project action
expectedResult: The system allows the project to be successfully closed (CLOSED / "ปิดโครงการแล้ว") again

title: Finance disbursement document columns check
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
steps: 1. Open the Finance Disbursement Document ("เอกสารส่งเบิกฝ่ายการเงิน") section
expectedResult: The table correctly displays the columns: No. ("ลำดับที่"), Reference Number ("เลขที่อ้างอิง"), Finance Sent Date ("วันที่ส่งการเงิน"), Subject ("เรื่อง"), Company ("บริษัท"), Installment No. ("งวดงานที่"), Amount ("จำนวนเงิน"), PO ("PO"), Contract ("สัญญา"), Department ("หน่วยงาน"), Creator ("ผู้จัดทำ"), and Finance Receive Date ("วันที่การเงินรับเอกสาร")

title: Download DOCX
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
steps: 1. Click the download .docx action
expectedResult: A .docx file is downloaded containing the latest data formatted according to the department template

title: Template matching
prerequisites: 1. User has downloaded the .docx file
steps: 1. Open the downloaded .docx file
expectedResult: The header positioning, signature lines, and overall layout strictly match the department standard template

title: Document list status scope
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Finance Staff
steps: 1. Open the Finance Disbursement Document page
expectedResult: The list displays only projects that have reached the IN_PROGRESS 5 status or higher

title: Vendor form accessible without login
prerequisites: 1. No active session (unauthenticated user)
steps: 1. Open the Vendor Form URL in an incognito or unauthenticated session
expectedResult: The system displays the vendor delivery form without requiring the user to log in

title: Responsive mobile layout
steps: 1. Open the Vendor Form on a mobile viewport
expectedResult: The form functions perfectly and the layout adapts correctly without breaking

title: Responsive desktop layout
steps: 1. Open the Vendor Form on a desktop viewport
expectedResult: The form functions perfectly and displays correctly on a desktop screen

title: PO required
steps:
1. Leave the PO Number ("เลขที่ใบสั่งซื้อ/สั่งจ้าง") field blank
2. Attempt to submit the form
expectedResult: The submission is blocked, and the system displays a required field validation error

title: PO must exist in the system
prerequisites: 1. The system has a valid list of PO numbers
testData: A random PO Number that does not exist in the system database
steps:
1. Enter the invalid PO Number ("เลขที่ใบสั่งซื้อ/สั่งจ้าง")
2. Attempt to submit the form
expectedResult: The system issues a warning that the PO is invalid/not found and blocks the submission

title: Prevent duplicate submission
testData: A PO Number that has already been successfully submitted
steps:
1. Enter the already-submitted PO Number ("เลขที่ใบสั่งซื้อ/สั่งจ้าง")
2. Attempt to submit the form
expectedResult: The system displays an error indicating a duplicate submission and blocks the action

title: Require at least one file
testData: A valid PO Number
steps:
1. Enter a valid PO Number ("เลขที่ใบสั่งซื้อ/สั่งจ้าง") but do not attach any files
2. Attempt to submit the form
expectedResult: The submission is blocked, and the system prompts the user to upload at least one file

title: Multiple uploads supported
testData: Multiple valid files
steps: 1. Select and upload more than one file to the form
expectedResult: The system successfully accepts and attaches multiple files to the submission

title: Allowed file types
testData: Image files (.jpg, .png) or a PDF file (.pdf)
steps: 1. Upload an allowed file type
expectedResult: The system accepts the file upload without any validation errors

title: Reject invalid file type
testData: A file that is not an image or a PDF (e.g., .exe, .zip)
steps: 1. Attempt to upload the invalid file type
expectedResult: The system rejects the file and displays a file type validation error

title: Preview/file name shown
testData: A valid file
steps: 1. Upload the file to the form
expectedResult: The system displays a preview or the file name allowing the user to verify the attachment before submitting

title: Submitted data routes to Vendor Responses page
prerequisites: 1. The user has successfully submitted a vendor form
steps:
1. Submit the form
2. Log in and open the internal Vendor Responses Page ("หน้าการตอบกลับจากคู่ค้า")
expectedResult: All submitted data and attached files are visible in the Vendor Responses table

title: Submitted data routes to Project ID Page
prerequisites: 1. The user has successfully submitted a vendor form
steps:
1. Submit the form
2. Log in and open the Project ID Page ("หน้ารายละเอียดโครงการ") for that specific PO
expectedResult: The submitted delivery data and files automatically appear in the project details view

title: Procurement Staff access
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Procurement Staff
steps:
1. Login as Procurement Staff
2. Open the Vendor Responses Page
expectedResult: The user successfully accesses the page and views the list of vendor responses

title: External user denied
prerequisites: 1. External user (unauthenticated)
steps: 1. Attempt to open the Vendor Responses Page URL directly without logging in
expectedResult: The system denies access and redirects or shows a standard unauthorized error

title: Vendor Responses table columns
prerequisites: 1. User is on the Vendor Responses Page
steps: 1. View the main data table
expectedResult: The table correctly displays the columns: Submit Date ("วันที่ส่ง"), PO Number ("เลขที่ PO"), Vendor Name ("ชื่อผู้ค้า"), Receive Number ("เลขที่ลงรับ"), Project Name ("โครงการ"), Department ("หน่วยงาน"), and Attachments ("ไฟล์แนบ")

title: Search by PO Number
prerequisites: 1. User is on the Vendor Responses Page
testData: A specific PO Number
steps: 1. Enter the PO Number into the search field
expectedResult: The table filters to display only records matching the provided PO Number

title: Search by Vendor Name
prerequisites: 1. User is on the Vendor Responses Page
testData: A partial or exact Vendor Name
steps: 1. Enter the Vendor Name ("ชื่อผู้ค้า") into the search field
expectedResult: The table filters to display only records matching the provided Vendor Name

title: Search by Receive Number
prerequisites: 1. User is on the Vendor Responses Page
testData: A partial or exact Receive Number
steps: 1. Enter the Receive Number ("เลขที่ลงรับ") into the search field
expectedResult: The table filters to display only records matching the provided Receive Number

title: Search by Project Name
prerequisites: 1. User is on the Vendor Responses Page
testData: A partial or exact Project Name
steps: 1. Enter the Project Name ("ชื่อโครงการ") into the search field
expectedResult: The table filters to display only records matching the provided Project Name

title: Search by Department
prerequisites: 1. User is on the Vendor Responses Page
testData: A specific Department name
steps: 1. Enter the Department ("หน่วยงาน") into the search field
expectedResult: The table filters to display only records matching the provided Department

title: Filter by Start and End Date
prerequisites: 1. User is on the Vendor Responses Page
testData: A valid Start Date and End Date
steps: 1. Select a Start Date and an End Date from the date filters
expectedResult: The table displays only the vendor responses submitted within the specified date range

title: Date validation (End before Start)
prerequisites: 1. User is using the date filter
testData: An End Date that is chronologically before the Start Date
steps:
1. Select a Start Date
2. Attempt to select an End Date earlier than the Start Date
expectedResult: The system displays a validation error and blocks the illogical date range search

title: Date validation (Future date limit)
prerequisites: 1. User is using the date filter
testData: A date in the future
steps: 1. Attempt to select an End Date that is greater than the current date
expectedResult: The system displays a validation error indicating future dates are not allowed for past submissions

title: Click attachment file to view
prerequisites: 1. A record exists with an attached file
steps: 1. Click on an attachment file link in the table
expectedResult: The system directly opens or previews the selected file successfully

title: Show all files related to a PO
prerequisites: 1. A PO has multiple file attachments
steps: 1. Expand or open the file list for that specific PO
expectedResult: The system clearly lists and groups all files associated with that PO

title: "Add Delivery Data" button visibility
prerequisites: 1. User is on the Vendor Responses Page
steps: 1. Look for the action button to manually add data
expectedResult: The "Add Delivery Data" ("ไปที่หน้ากรอกฟอร์มส่งใบแจ้งหนี้/ใบส่งของ/ใบวางบิล") button is clearly visible and accessible
